questionHtml: Calculate the new angular speed of the rotating system.
markschemeHtml:
«I = 450 + mr2»

I «= 450 + 30 × 22» = 570 «kgm2»

«L = 570 × ω = 747»

ω = 1.3 «rads–1»

 

Watch for ECF from (a) and (b).

Accept BCA, values in the range: 1.25 to 1.35.

[2 marks]

meta.title: Calculate the new angular speed of the rotating system.
